title: onosma tricerosperma subsp. catalaunica
intro: Onosma tricerosperma subsp. catalaunica, also known as Catalonian Onosma, is a plant species within the genus Onosma, characterized by its yellow or purple flowers and medicinal properties. The plant is rich in alkaloids, particularly onocerin and onosmin, which have been found to possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Catalonian Onosma has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and mucolytic properties, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of Onosma tricerosperma subsp. catalaunica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to alleviate symptoms.
